productDisplayName: Arrow Men Stripes Navy Blue Shirts
description: CompositionNavy blue shirt with white stripes made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, a buttoned front placket, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, fine stitches - SPI 16 on the shoulders, patch pocket on the left chest, box pleat at the back and a curved hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash separately in cold water in a gentle cycle inside out, using a high quality detergentDo not bleach or wringTumble dry lowLine dry inside out in shadeWarm steam iron do not iron on decorationsCreated from densely constructed cotton fabric in double fold and super single yarns, German threads and interlinings, the fine cut of this striped shirt from arrow's President's Collection offers a flattering formal silhouette and makes for an easy addition to your wardrobe. Team it with crisp formal pants and a blazer and add on leather shoes and classy accessories for that perfect formal look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'11& rdquo and shoulders 17.5"
